description: Lexer tokenizes ##, @@, $ with correct disambiguation of # vs ## and @ vs @@
Parser produces correct AST for hashmap declaration, literal key access, dynamic key access, key set, ##, @@
steps: Parse counts{} = [] into HashDeclStmt with empty keys
Parse for k in ##map into ForInStmt with ## iterable

description: Runtime supports MapFromKeysValues, IndexKey, IndexKeyStr, IndexKeySet, IndexKeySetStr, MapKeys, MapValues
steps: MapFromKeysValues creates SlopValue with Keys and Elements
MapFromKeysValues with empty keys creates empty hashmap
IndexKeyStr finds key and returns element
MapKeys returns array of key strings
MapValues returns array of values without keys

description: Codegen lowers HashDeclStmt, KeyAccessExpr, DynKeyAccessExpr, KeySetStmt, DynKeySetStmt, ## and @@ to sloprt calls
steps: Lower HashDeclStmt to sloprt.MapFromKeysValues with []string composite lit
Lower KeyAccessExpr to sloprt.IndexKeyStr with string literal
Lower DynKeyAccessExpr to sloprt.IndexKey with variable

description: 40+ e2e tests covering hashmap declaration, key access, dynamic key, key set, ##, @@, and combined patterns
steps: Hashmap declaration: 2 keys, 1 key, empty, 3+ keys, mismatch panic
Key access literal: string value, nested value, missing key panic
Key access dynamic: via variable, in loop over ##keys
Key set literal: existing key, new key, set then verify
Key set dynamic: via variable, new key, in loop
## prefix: returns keys, empty hashmap, for-in over keys, length of keys
@@ prefix: returns values, empty hashmap, in expression
Combined: maps.slop roadmap test, hashmap in fn, count pattern, key iteration
Edge cases: underscore key, single key, reassign, value in arithmetic

description: Lexer tokenizes null keyword as TOKEN_NULL
steps: Tokenize x = null → IDENT, ASSIGN, NULL

description: Parser produces NullLiteral AST node for null keyword
steps: Parse [null, null] → ArrayLiteral with NullLiteral elements
Parse x = null → AssignStmt with NullLiteral value

description: Runtime SlopNull type with strict semantics: panics on arithmetic, truthiness, ordered comparisons, iteration; supports equality and formatting
15+ E2E tests for null: assignment, formatting, equality, arithmetic panics, truthiness panics, contains, length, forward declaration
Comprehensive example files covering all language features: math.slop, fns.slop, arrays.slop, maps.slop, null.slop
steps: math.slop: all numeric types, arithmetic, comparison, logical ops
fns.slop: functions, if/else, for-in, infinite loop, break, multi-assign
arrays.slop: all 11 array operators, index-set, variable index
maps.slop: declaration, key access/set, dynamic keys, ##, @@, numeric index
null.slop: forward declaration, null in arrays, equality, str, contains
